source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A coflowing (same direction) heat exchanger has one line with 0.5 kg/s oxygen at 17\circ\text{C}, 200 kPa entering, and the other line has 0.6 kg/s nitrogen at 150 kPa, 500 K entering. The heat exchanger is very long, so the two flows exit at the same temperature. Use constant heat capacities and find the total rate of entropy generation.
